contentBlocks.title: How does the PNG to GIF converter work?
contentBlocks.html: Convert PNG graphics to GIF. Ideal for simple icons and graphics. Conversion runs entirely in your browser — files are never sent to a server. No registration, no file limit.

items.question: What is GIF format?
items.answer: GIF is a widely supported image format that supports up to 256 colors. It is ideal for simple graphics, icons, and illustrations.

items.question: Does converting to GIF reduce quality?
items.answer: GIF uses a limited 256-color palette, so photographs may lose some detail. It works best for graphics with flat colors.

items.question: Are my files sent to a server?
items.answer: No. Conversion runs entirely in your browser. Files never leave your computer.
